name_en: 💖 Comes with full original green box packaging 💖. This slim and long wallet features black GG Supreme canvas with tonal leather trim and interlocking double-G logo, highlighting the charm of classic design. Black GG Supreme canvas, eco-friendly material. Black leather trim. Adhesive fiber lining, oval interlocking double-G leather logo. Eight card slots, two bill compartments. Dimensions: 11*9cm. Color: Black/pvc. Model: 671652.
